notes: The AMB installer and wrapper force Codex CLI for benchmark LLM calls.
The wrapper unsets GEMINI_API_KEY and GOOGLE_API_KEY before invoking AMB.
targetMemory records the public AMB baseline being beaten, not a model used in this Remnic run.

verification.command: node scripts/bench/verify-amb-sota.mjs --result <agent-memory-benchmark-checkout>/outputs-remnic-agent-official/personamem/remnic-agent-full-2727-v24-concurrency3/agent/128k.json --min-queries 2727 --manifest-out benchmarks/results/amb/remnic-agent-full-2727-v24-concurrency3-sota-manifest.json --command "REMNIC_AMB_CONCURRENCY=3 scripts/bench/run-amb-remnic.sh --amb <agent-memory-benchmark-checkout> --split 128k --mode agent --output-dir outputs-remnic-agent-official --name remnic-agent-full-2727-v24-concurrency3" --amb-dir <agent-memory-benchmark-checkout>
verification.reason: The original verifier manifest recorded a dirty Remnic checkout and missing AMB git provenance. Current verification rejects dirty or missing provenance before publishing a SOTA claim.
